rulings.Case Title: GARY TSIFRIN ET AL VS. IAN DUGGAN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Confirm Arbitration Award And Obtain Judgment On Award
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 30, 2018 line 1. PETITIONERs GARY TSIFRIN, JEFF WINTER, CLAUDIA WINTER, FRANCESCA WONG's Motion To Confirm Arbitration Award And Obtain Judgment On Award Continued to June 21, 2018 pursuant to agreement of all counsel's as stated in the Notice of Motion filed on May 10, 2018. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: JESUS THOMAS SOTO VS. PETER LOUIE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Taxing Costs And Striking Costs
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 30, 2018 line 2. Defendant's Motion For Order Taxing Costs And Striking Costs DENIED because Plaintiff is entitled to costs as requested in the April 16, 2018 Memorandum of Costs. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: ARAFAT HERZALLAH VS. NIMER MASSIS ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 30, 2018 line 3. DEFENDANTs FO 347 EDDY STREET PROPERTY, LLC, THE MOSSER COMPANIES, INC., DONNA STERN, and JOE COLEMAN's DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT DENIED because the complaint states sufficient facts to constitute the six causes of actions against the various parties. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: JOSEFINA PACUMIO VS. WELLS FARGO BANK N.A A BUSINESS ENTITY ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 30, 2018 line 4. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT off calendar. Plaintiff filed a First Amended Complaint on May 16, 2018. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: OCEAN AVENUE REAL ESTATE FUND, LLC VS. CATHERINE HERRERA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Ccp 2030.090 Protective Discovery Order
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 30, 2018 line 5. DEFENDANT CATHERINE HERRERA's Motion For Ccp 2030.090 Protective Discovery Order DENIED because Plaintiff did not promptly move for this protective order pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure section 2030.090. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: 112 HYDE ST. LLC VS. SALEH ALI MOHAMED ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 30, 2018 line 10. DEFENDANT SALEH MOHAMAD's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER GRANTED. Plaintiff's evidence in opposition is all conclusory or based on hearsay.= (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: AGPM 675 O'FARRELL, LP. A DELAWARE LIMITED VS. ZACHARY MERCER ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 30, 2018 line 7. DEFENDANT ZACHARY MERCER's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT off calendar. Case settled on May 24. 2018. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: PAUL WONG VS. FLORENCIO EDILBERTO GONZALEZ ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 30, 2018 line 8. DEFENDANTs FLORENCIO GONZALEZ and GRISELDA ROMERO's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT DENIED because Code of Civil Procedure section 1161(4) does not require the tenant be given the opportunity to cure. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: THE FIELD FAMILY PARTNERSHIP VS. JOSHUA BRANDT ET AL
